lingala.explore_drag_the_protractor_name_the_a: Luka — benda protractor, pesa angle nkombo
lingala.acute_90_right_90_obtuse_90_180_straig: Ya nsɔ́ngɛ < 90°, sembo = 90°, ya monene 90–180°, alima = 180°, ya koleka > 180°. Protractor esalemaki pene na 1801; eloko ya ndámbo-ya-cercle ezali kaka kosala na kelasi nyonso ya géométrie.
lingala.estimation_builds_spatial_sense_precis: Bomeki ekolisaka boyebi ya esika; komeka bonene ya sikisiki ekolisaka momesano ya protractor. Common Core 4.MD.5–7: ba-angle lokola biteni ya kobaluka mobimba (1/360 ya baluka).
lingala.complementary_sum_to_90_supplementary_: Ba-complémentaire esangani na 90°; ba-supplémentaire na 180°; ba-angle ya kotalana ezali ndenge moko; ba-angle ya kati oyo ekabwani ekokani soki milɔ́ngɔ́ ezali kolanda ndenge moko. Makambo oyo minei efungolaka mingi ya bilembeteli ya kelasi ya kati.
lingala.tools_bisector_second_ray_calculator: Bisaleli — bisector, litoyo ya mibale, calculatrice
lingala.bisect_cut_in_half_the_construction_wi: Bisect = kokata na kati-kati (kotonga na compas + molɔ́ngɔ́-sembo ezali na Euclid Buku I, Proposition 9). Bisaleli ya sikawa: protractor, scie miter, théodolite — likanisi moko, kaka ekamweli malamu.
lingala.vertical_angles_are_equal: Ba-angle ya kotalana ezali ndenge moko!
lingala.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips: Fina mpo na kozwa batoli ya angle ya yo moko!
lingala.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips_2: Fina mpo na kozwa batoli ya angle ya yo moko!
lingala.what_type_of_angle_is_this: Angle oyo ezali ya ndenge nini?
lingala.look_at_the_angle_on_the_protractor_nu: Tala angle na protractor (motango ebombani). Ezali ba-degré boni?
lingala.opposite_angles_formed_by_intersecting: Ba-angle oyo etalani oyo milɔ́ngɔ́ ya kokatana esalaka; ntango nyonso ndenge moko
lingala.angles_that_share_a_common_vertex_and_: Ba-angle oyo ezali na nsɔ́ngɛ moko mpe mopanzi moko
lingala.two_rays_overlap_exactly_no_rotation: Bitoyo mibale ezali kotondana sikisiki. Baluka ezali te.
lingala.less_than_a_right_angle_pizza_slice_le: Moke koleka angle sembo. Eteni ya pizza, "moke koleka karé".
lingala.exactly_90_corner_of_a_square_perpendi: Sikisiki 90°. Nsɔ́ngɛ ya karé. Milɔ́ngɔ́ ya perpendiculaire.
lingala.between_right_and_straight_wider_than_: Kati ya sembo mpe alima. Monene koleka nsɔ́ngɛ ya karé.
lingala.half_rotation_the_two_rays_form_a_stra: Ndámbo ya baluka. Bitoyo mibale esalaka molɔ́ngɔ́ ya alima.
lingala.greater_than_a_straight_angle_measure_: Monene koleka angle ya alima. Meka bonene ya "libándá" ya angle.
lingala.complete_turn_the_two_rays_overlap_exa: Baluka ya kokoka. Bitoyo mibale ezali kotondana sikisiki (lokola 0°, kasi ebaluki mobimba).
lingala.corresponding_parallel_lines_transvers: Ekokani (milɔ́ngɔ́ ya kolanda + molɔ́ngɔ́ ya kokatisa)
lingala.co_interior_consecutive_interior: Ya kati esangani (ya kati ya kolandana)
lingala.interactive_geometry_references_pick_a: Ba-referanse ya géométrie ya kosangana — poná likambo.
lingala.interior_angle_sum_n_2_180_for_any_n_s: Bosangani ya angle ya kati = (n − 2) × 180° mpo na polygone nyonso ya mipanzi n. Angle ya libándá ya polygone RÉGULIER moko = 360°/n. Bosangani ya ba-angle ya libándá ntango nyonso = 360°.
lingala.soh_cah_toa_sine_opp_hyp_cosine_adj_hy: SOH-CAH-TOA: Sinus = Etalani/Hypoténuse, Cosinus = Pembeni/Hypoténuse, Tangente = Etalani/Pembeni. Ba-fonction ya trigo elakisaka ba-ratio ya mipanzi ya triangle sembo; epanzami na ba-angle nyonso na nzela ya cercle ya ezele.
lingala.these_angles_their_trig_values_are_wor: Ba-angle oyo + bantuya na yango ya trigo ebongi kokanga na motó — ebimaka mbala na mbala na matematiki, physique, mpe ingénierie.
lingala.1_rad_180_57_296_1_180_0_01745_rad_1_g: 1 rad = 180/π ≈ 57.296°. 1° = π/180 ≈ 0.01745 rad. 1 gon = 0.9°. Ba-calculatrice mingi ezali na mode ya degré/radian — talelá ozali na mode ya malamu!
lingala.angle_problem_solving_shortcuts: ⚡ Banzela ya mokuse mpo na kosilisa mikakatano ya angle
lingala.bearings_measured_clockwise_from_north: Bitalelo emekami na NGONGA-BALUKA kobanda na nord. Boussole ya momesano ya nsɔngɛ 16 ezali na 22.5° kati ya bitalelo ya kolandana.
lingala.tower_of_pisa_actual_lean_4: Tour ya Pisa — bogumbami ya solo ≈ 4°
lingala.three_views_of_the_same_trigonometric_: Ba-vue misato ya montage moko ya trigo. Benda slider ya angle (to bosanda ya tour) — elakiseli nyonso ebongwani na mbala moko. Na sima zwá quiz ya mokakatano-ya-kobalusa: silisa bomeki ya solo na elakiseli kaka moko.
lingala.change_the_angle_and_watch_all_three_u: Bongola angle mpe tala nyonso misato ebongwana esika moko — oyo nde ndimbola ya "likanisi moko, bilakiseli misato".
lingala.pisa_is_roughly_56_m_tall_leaning_4_to: (Pisa ezali pene na 56 m ya bosanda, egumbami ≈ 4° lelo)
lingala.each_quiz_gives_you_partial_info_use_t: Quiz mokomoko epesaka yo sanza ndámbo. Salelá boyokani oyo omoni na likolo mpo na kotánga motuya oyo ezangi.
lingala.tip_rearrange_tan_opp_adj_if_you_know_: Toli: bongola tan(θ) = etalani/pembeni — soki oyebi θ mpe mopanzi moko, okoki kosilisa mosusu. Soki oyebi mipanzi mibale, zwá arctan.
lingala.quantity_with_both_magnitude_and_direc: Motuya oyo ezali na bonene MPE elakisi. Esalemi lokola litoyo. Ndakisa: mbangu, nguya, boningani.
lingala.scalar_just_a_number_mass_temperature_: Scalaire = kaka motango (kilo, molunge, ntango). Vecteur = bonene + elakisi.
lingala.place_tail_of_second_at_head_of_first_: Tiá mokila ya mibale na motó ya liboso. Résultat = mokila ya liboso tii na motó ya mibale.
lingala.place_tails_together_diagonal_of_paral: Tiá mikila esika moko. Diagonale ya parallélogramme = résultat.
lingala.vector_v_at_angle_v_v_cos_v_y_v_sin: Vecteur v na angle θ: vₓ = v·cos θ, v_y = v·sin θ.
lingala.v_v_v_y_v_z_pythagoras_in_any_dimensio: |v| = √(vₓ² + v_y² + v_z²). Pythagore na dimension nyonso.
lingala.magnitude_1_v_v_v_often_called_the_dir: Bonene 1. v̂ = v / |v|. Babengaka yango mbala mingi "elakisi" ya v.
lingala.a_b_a_b_cos_gives_scalar_zero_when_per: a·b = |a||b|cos θ. Epesaka scalaire. Zéro soki ezali perpendiculaire. Mínus soki angle > 90°.
lingala.a_b_a_b_sin_n_gives_vector_perpendicul: a×b = |a||b|sin θ · n̂. Epesaka vecteur PERPENDICULAIRE na nyonso mibale. Bonene = etando ya parallélogramme.
lingala.curl_fingers_from_a_to_b_thumb_points_: Gumbá misapi kobanda na a tii na b. Mokɔmɔ elakisi elakisi ya a×b. (Ba-coordonnée ya lobɔkɔ ya mobali.)
lingala.c_a_c_b_generates_a_plane_or_line_of_v: c₁·a + c₂·b. Ebimisaka plan (to molɔ́ngɔ́) ya ba-vecteur.
lingala.newton_s_2nd_law_f_ma_net_force_is_vec: Mobeko ya 2 ya Newton: F = ma. Nguya ya mobimba ezali bosangani-vecteur ya banguya nyonso.
lingala.airplane_heading_wind_vector_ground_ve: Elakisi ya mpɛpɔ + vecteur ya mopepe → mbangu ya mabelé (bosangani-vecteur).
lingala.equilateral_triangle_square_regular_he: Triangle équilatéral, karé, hexagone régulier. Kaka ba-polygone régulier oyo ekokaka kotondisa plan.
lingala.interior_angle_must_divide_360_triangl: Angle ya kati esengeli kokabola 360°. Triangle 60° (×6), karé 90° (×4), hexagone 120° (×3). Pentagone 108° ekabolaka 360° te → ekoki kotondisa yango moko te.
lingala.8_in_total_combine_multiple_regular_po: 8 na mobimba. Esangisi ba-polygone régulier ebele; bosangani moko na nsɔ́ngɛ mokomoko.
lingala.aperiodic_tiling_never_repeats_exactly: Carrelage apériodique — ezongelaka sikisiki te. Symétrie ya mbala 5. Epesaki likanisi ya bomoni ya ba-quasicristal.
lingala.hexagonal_tiling_minimizes_total_perim: Carrelage ya hexagone ekitisaka périmètre ya mobimba mpo na etando epesami. Emonisamaki na Hales (1999). Ntina oyo banzoi esalelaka ba-hexagone.
lingala.each_region_points_closest_to_one_seed: Etuka mokomoko = ba-point oyo ezali pene na point moko ya "nkona". Ebimaka na bomoi (batɔnɔ ya girafe, bokabwani ya potopoto, bosangisi ya ba-cellule).
lingala.on_a_hyperbolic_plane_regular_pentagon: Na plan hyperbolique, ba-pentagone régulier (mpe bililingi mosusu ebele) EKOKI kotondisa. Molɔngɔ ya M.C. Escher ya "Circle Limit".
lingala.colored_squares_that_must_match_neighb: Ba-karé ya langi oyo esengeli kokokana na baninga na mipanzi. Ekoki komekola machine ya Turing → mokakatano ya carrelage ekoki koyanolama te na ndenge ya lolenge nyonso.
lingala.a_single_tile_that_aperiodically_tiles: Carreau kaka moko oyo etondisaka plan na ndenge apériodique (bililingi "hat" mpe "spectre"). Bomoni monene ya kala mingi te.
lingala.in_a_right_triangle_a_b_c_where_c_is_t: Na triangle sembo, a² + b² = c² epai c ezali hypoténuse. Basangani ya mituya (a, b, c) oyo ekokisaka oyo babengaka ba-triple ya Pythagore. Triple "ya ebandeli" ezali na facteur ya lisanga te.
lingala.for_positive_integers_m_n_with_no_comm: Mpo na mituya ya solo m > n oyo ezali na facteur ya lisanga te mpe nyonso mibale ezali ya bilili te, a = m² − n², b = 2mn, c = m² + n². Meka m=2, n=1 → (3,4,5).
lingala.3d_solids_volumes_and_surface_areas: ⬢ Ba-solide 3D — ba-volume mpe ba-etando ya surface
lingala.careers_that_use_angles_every_day: 💼 Misala oyo esalelaka ba-angle mokolo na mokolo
lingala.circle_has_most_area_for_a_perimeter: Cercle ezali na etando mingi mpo na périmètre
lingala.isoperimetric_inequality_4_a_p_equalit: Bokeseni isopérimétrique: 4πA ≤ P². Bokokani kaka mpo na ba-cercle. Ntina oyo ba-bulle ya sabuni + baplanɛti ezali libungutulu.
lingala.sphere_has_most_volume_for_a_surface_a: Sphère ezali na volume mingi mpo na etando ya surface
lingala.3d_version_of_above_single_bubbles_are: Version 3D ya likolo. Ba-bulle moko-moko ezali ba-sphère; ba-bulle esangani ekutanaka na ba-angle ya 120°.
lingala.regular_hexagons_tile_most_efficiently: Ba-hexagone régulier ekarelaka na ndenge ya malamu koleka
lingala.honeycomb_conjecture_proven_1999_by_ha: Conjecture ya ndako ya nzoi (emonisamaki 1999 na Hales): carrelage ya hexagone ezali na bolai ya bord ya mobimba ya moke koleka na kati ya bokabwani nyonso mpo na etando.
lingala.triangle_is_most_rigid_shape: Triangle ezali elilingi ya makasi koleka
lingala.cannot_be_deformed_without_changing_si: Ekoki kobebisama te soki bolai ya mipanzi ebongwani te. Ntina oyo ba-pont + ba-charpente ya nsamba esalelaka ba-triangle.
lingala.square_tiles_fill_the_plane_with_no_ga: Ba-carreau ya karé etondisaka plan kozanga esika ya polele. Ndenge moko mpo na ba-rectangle + ba-parallélogramme.
lingala.hexagonal_packing_of_circles_fills_90_: Bosangisi hexagonal ya ba-cercle etondisaka ~90.7% ya plan (malamu koleka). Bosangisi ya karé kaka ~78.5%.
lingala.fcc_hcp_both_achieve_74_density_kepler: FCC + HCP nyonso mibale ekómaka na ~74% ya bozindo (conjecture ya Kepler, emonisamaki 2014 na Hales).
lingala.only_5_in_3d_tetrahedron_cube_octahedr: Kaka 5 na 3D: tétraèdre, kubu, octaèdre, dodécaèdre, icosaèdre. (Platon alobelaki.)
lingala.4_vertices_6_edges_4_faces_minimum_3d_: Basɔ́ngɛ 4, ba-bord 6, bilongi 4. Elilingi 3D ya moke koleka.
lingala.for_sphere_inscribed_in_cylinder_h_2r_: Mpo na sphère inscrit na cylindre (h = 2r): V_sphère = 2/3 × V_cylindre. (Résultat oyo Archimède alingaki mingi.)
lingala.16_vertices_32_edges_24_faces_8_cells_: Basɔ́ngɛ 16, ba-bord 32, bilongi 24, ba-cellule 8. Ekoki kofungwama na ba-kubu 8 (na Salvador Dalí).
lingala.single_sided_surface_cut_down_middle_l: Surface ya ngámbo moko. Katá na kati → boucle moko ya molai koleka. Katá na 1/3 → ba-anneau mibale ekangani (moko Möbius).
lingala.closed_non_orientable_surface_inside_o: Surface ekangami oyo ekoki kolakisama te. Kati = libándá. Ekoki kosalama na 3D kaka na komikatana.
lingala.curve_of_constant_width_not_a_circle_c: Courbe ya bonene ya ntango nyonso (cercle te!). Okoki kobalusa libaya na ba-rouleau misato ya Reuleaux malamu. Ba-mèche ya perceuse esalelaka yango.
lingala.two_parallel_polygons_rotated_360_2n_c: Ba-polygone mibale ya kolanda oyo ebaluki 360°/2n, ekangami na ba-triangle. Tétraèdre ezali antiprisme ya pɛtɛ koleka.
lingala.has_chirality_left_right_handed_forms_: Ezali na chiralité — bililingi ya lobɔkɔ ya mwasi + ya mobali. Moko ya ba-solide chiral mibale ya Archimède (mosusu ezali dodécaèdre camus).
lingala.equation_z_xy_straight_lines_lie_on_it: Équation z = xy. Milɔ́ngɔ́ ya alima ezali likolo na yango na basangani mibale. Esalelami na Pringles + ba-nsamba mosusu.
lingala.gomboc_2006_is_first_known_mono_monost: "Gömböc" (2006) ezali ya liboso eyebani ya mono-monostatique — kotɛlɛma moko ya makasi + moko ya kolɛmba. Lokola Weeble ya komitɛlɛmisa.
lingala.cannot_tile_plane_alone_gaps_but_7_egg: Ekoki kotondisa plan yango moko te — bisika ya polele. Kasi bililingi 7 ya likei esalaka lisanga lokola hexagone.
lingala.common_in_crystals_cube_nacl_octahedro: Ezali mingi na ba-cristal: kubu (NaCl), octaèdre (diamant, fluorite), dodécaèdre (pyrite, grenat).
lingala.truncated_icosahedron_60_carbons_like_: Icosaèdre tronqué. Ba-carbone 60. Lokola motindo ya ballon ya makolo. Emonanaki 1985.
lingala.helical_10_5_base_pairs_per_turn_major: Ya hélice, ~10.5 bikeseni ya base na baluka. Ba-rainure minene + mike. Diamètre ya ntango nyonso ~2 nm.
lingala.hexagonal_prisms_with_rhombic_bottoms_: Ba-prisme hexagonal na ba-nsé ya rhombe. Banzoi ebalusaka na mayele te — biophysique ekitisaka etando ya surface na ndenge ya bomoi.
lingala.drop_spaghetti_at_random_average_numbe: Bwaká spaghetti na ndenge nyonso — motango ya moyenne ya bokatani = (L/πd) × π × n. Esalelami mpo na komeka π na kelasi.
lingala.study_of_flags_comes_from_latin_vexill: Boyekoli ya badrapo. Euti na Latin vexillum (drapo oyo basoda ya farasa ya Rome ememaki).
lingala.keep_it_simple_a_child_can_draw_from_m: Tiká yango pɛtɛ (mwana akoki kobenda na motó), salelá elembo ya ntina, ba-langi ya moboko 2-3, kozanga makomi to bakachɛ, zalá ya bokeseni.
lingala.most_common_2_3_e_g_france_germany_us_: Ya mingi: 2:3 (ndakisa, France, Allemagne). USA ezali 1:1.9. UK ezali 1:2. Ya ndenge mosusu: Suisse 1:1, Népal ya karé te.
lingala.symbols_added_to_flag_stars_crosses_an: Bilembo babakisi na drapo (minzoto, ba-croix, banyama). Maloba ya héraldique elimbolaka esika.
lingala.upper_left_rectangle_about_1_4_the_fla: Rectangle ya likolo-ya-mwasi (pene na 1/4 ya drapo). Minzoto ya USA ekɔtaka awa. Australie, NZ mpe esalelaka motindo ya canton.
lingala.hoist_side_attached_to_pole_fly_opposi: Hoist = ngámbo ekangami na likonzi. Fly = ngámbo ya kotalana (ya bonsomi).
lingala.red_courage_revolution_blood_blue_ocea: Motane = mpiko, mobulu, makila. Bulé = mbu, likolo, bonsomi. Vert = mabelé, bomoi, Islam. Mpɛmbɛ = kimia, bopɛto. Jaune/Wolo = bomɛngo, moi.
lingala.flying_flag_upside_down_where_asymmetr: Kotombola drapo na nsé-likolo (epai ezali symétrique te); kotombola drapo na katikati ya likonzi = matanga.
lingala.light_blue_with_map_un_or_compass_nato: Bulé pɛtɛ na karte (ONU) to boussole (OTAN). Na nkó ekimaka bilembo ya ekólo/lingomba.
lingala.flags_are_codified_geometry_every_nati: Badrapo ezali géométrie ekomami. Drapo nyonso ya ekólo ezali na ba-spécification ya sikisiki: ratio ya bonene, ba-code ya langi, bisika ya bilembo, ba-angle ya minzoto.
lingala.selected_national_organizational_flags: Badrapo ya bikólo + ya mangomba baponi
lingala.roof_pitch_ramp_grade_tables: ◢ Batabɛlɛ ya bopanzami ya nsamba + degré ya rampe
lingala.x_12_means_x_inches_rise_per_12_inches: X:12 elimboli X pouce ya komata mpo na 12 pouce ya kokende horizontal.
lingala.ramp_grades_transportation_slopes: Ba-degré ya rampe + bopanzami ya transport
lingala.total_solar_system_mass: Kilo ya mobimba ya système solaire
lingala.149_597_870_700_m_defined_exactly_ligh: 149,597,870,700 m. Elimbolami sikisiki. Pole ezwaka ~8.3 miniti mpo na koleka 1 UA.
lingala.9_461_10_m_distance_light_travels_in_1: 9.461×10¹⁵ m. Ntaka oyo pole etambolaka na mbula 1 ya Julien.
lingala.3_26_light_years_distance_at_which_1_a: ~3.26 mbula-pole. Ntaka epai 1 UA emonanaka lokola 1 arcseconde.
lingala.165_au_2024_fastest_human_made_object_: ~165 UA (2024). Eloko ya mbangu koleka oyo bato basali oyo ezali kobima na système solaire. Ezali kaka kotinda ba-donnée.
lingala.620_million_tons_of_h_he_every_second_: ~620 milio ya tone ya H → He na segɔnde nyonso. Ebungisaka ~4 milio ya tone lokola nguya (E = mc²).
lingala.stream_of_charged_particles_400_800_km: Moluka ya biteni-mike ya charge. ~400-800 km/s pene na Mabelé. Esalaka ba-aurore + ekamwaka mikila ya ba-comète.
lingala.notable_peaks_their_slopes: ⛰ Basɔ́ngɛ ya lokumu + bopanzami na yango
lingala.solar_system_planets_dwarf_planets: 🪐 Baplanɛti ya système solaire + baplanɛti mikɛ
lingala.axial_tilt_drives_seasons_tilt_90_mean: Bogumbami ya axe ememaka bileko. Bogumbami > 90° elimboli baluka ya sima (Vénus, Uranus, Pluton).
lingala.can_you_cross_each_of_the_7_bridges_of: Okoki koleka pont mokomoko ya ba-pont 7 ya Königsberg mbala moko kaka?
lingala.no_euler_proved_1736_you_need_each_nod: Te. Euler amonisaki (1736) osengeli node mokomoko ezala na degré ya pair, longola kaka mbala mosusu ba-node 2 ya degré ya impair. Königsberg ezalaki na ba-node 4 ya degré ya impair. Ebandaki théorie ya ba-graphe.
lingala.using_only_compass_straightedge_constr: Na kosalela kaka compas + molɔ́ngɔ́-sembo, tongá karé oyo ezali na etando moko na cercle epesami.
lingala.impossible_is_transcendental_lindemann: Ekoki te. π ezali transcendant (Lindemann 1882). Ekoki kotongama te na misala ya C+S ya motango moke.
lingala.construct_a_cube_with_twice_the_volume: Tongá kubu na volume mbala mibale ya kubu epesami na kosalela compas + molɔ́ngɔ́-sembo.
lingala.impossible_requires_2_which_is_algebra: Ekoki te. Esengeli ∛2, oyo ezali algébrique ya degré 3, kasi C+S ebimisaka kaka mituya ya degré 2ⁿ.
lingala.divide_an_arbitrary_angle_into_3_equal: Kabolá angle nyonso na biteni misato ya bokokani na compas + molɔ́ngɔ́-sembo.
lingala.impossible_in_general_some_specific_an: Ekoki te na ndenge ya lolenge nyonso. Ba-angle mosusu ya sikisiki (ndakisa, 180°) ekoki. Origami EKOKI kokabola ba-angle nyonso na biteni misato.
lingala.given_two_circles_how_do_they_relate: Soki bapesi ba-cercle mibale, ndenge nini eyokanaka?
lingala.5_cases_separate_externally_tangent_in: Bikelamu 5: ekabwani, tangent na libándá, ekatani (ba-point 2), tangent na kati, moko na kati ya mosusu.
lingala.can_every_planar_map_be_colored_with_4: Karte nyonso ya plan ekoki kotiama langi na ba-langi 4 na ndenge bituka ya pembeni ekabolaka langi te?
lingala.yes_proven_by_appel_haken_1976_first_m: Ɛɛ. Emonisamaki na Appel + Haken (1976) — théorème monene ya liboso emonisamaki na lisalisi ya ordinateur.
lingala.what_path_from_a_to_b_b_lower_minimize: Nzela nini kobanda A tii B (B na nsé) ekitisaka ntango ya eloko oyo ezali kokita na nsé ya nguya ya bozitu?
lingala.cycloid_posed_by_bernoulli_1696_solved: Cycloïde. Etunamaki na Bernoulli (1696). Esilisamaki na Newton na butu moko + na basusu 4 na kati Leibniz.
lingala.cut_a_circular_pizza_into_8_sectors_wi: Katá pizza ya libungutulu na ba-secteur 8 na bikato oyo eleki na point moko (esengeli centre te). Biteni ya kolandana ezali na etando ya bokokani.
lingala.true_for_any_odd_multiple_of_4_sectors: Ya solo mpo na ba-secteur nyonso ya impair × 4. Esalaka na 8, 12, 16, ...
lingala.for_what_radii_of_intersecting_circles: Mpo na ba-rayon nini ya ba-cercle ekatani nde elilingi-ya-sanza ("lune") + lentille ezali na etando ya bokokani?
lingala.ratio_depends_solved_analytically_roma: Ratio etaleli — esilisami na ndenge ya analyse. Géométrie ya bolingo euti na buku ya 1942.
lingala.intersection_of_two_perpendicular_cyli: Bokatani ya ba-cylindre mibale ya perpendiculaire ya rayon moko.
lingala.has_4_vertices_looks_like_a_4_faced_cu: Ezali na basɔ́ngɛ 4, emonanaka lokola litɔ́ngɔ ya bilongi 4. Volume = (16/3)r³.
lingala.drop_a_needle_of_length_l_onto_paralle: Bwaká ntonga ya bolai L likolo ya milɔ́ngɔ́ ya kolanda oyo ekabwani na d. Probabilité ya koleka molɔ́ngɔ́ ezali boni?
lingala.2l_d_for_l_d_method_to_compute_by_drop: 2L/(πd) mpo na L ≤ d. Ndenge ya kotánga π na kobwaka ba-ntonga!
lingala.can_you_cut_a_circle_into_pieces_rearr: Okoki kokata cercle na biteni mpe kobongisa yango na karé ya etando ya bokokani?
lingala.yes_laczkovich_1990_with_10_pieces_cho: Ɛɛ (Laczkovich 1990) — na biteni ~10⁵⁰. Axiome ya boponi esengeli. Okoki kosalela bikato ya ciseaux te; biteni ezali ya kokamwa.
lingala.can_you_cut_a_ball_into_pieces_rearran: Okoki kokata bulɛ na biteni mpe kobongisa yango na ba-bulɛ mibale ya bonene moko?
lingala.yes_requires_axiom_of_choice_non_measu: Ɛɛ — esengeli axiome ya boponi + biteni oyo ekoki komekama te. Ebomaka mayele kasi na matematiki ezali solo.
lingala.soap_film_minimal_surface: Surface ya moke ya lomposo ya sabuni
lingala.why_do_soap_films_take_certain_shapes: Mpo na nini ba-lomposo ya sabuni ezwaka bililingi mosusu?
lingala.they_minimize_surface_area_catenoid_be: Ekitisaka etando ya surface. Caténoïde (kati ya ba-anneau), bord ya Plateau (bisika ya bokatani). Ebimisaka géométrie ya kitoko.
lingala.simplest_regular_tiling_schl_fli_symbo: Carrelage régulier ya pɛtɛ koleka. Symbole ya Schläfli {4,4}.
lingala.3_hexagons_around_each_vertex_6_3_hone: Ba-hexagone 3 zingazinga ya nsɔ́ngɛ mokomoko. {6,3}. Ndako ya nzoi. Malamu koleka.
lingala.octagons_squares_4_8_8_hispanic_coloni: Ba-octogone + ba-karé (4.8.8). Motindo ya ba-carreau ya kala ya Espagnol.
lingala.squares_triangles_3_3_4_3_4_chiral_has: Ba-karé + ba-triangle (3.3.4.3.4). Chiral — ezali na lobɔkɔ.
lingala.just_rhombi_can_be_combined_to_make_pe: Kaka ba-rhombe. Ekoki kosanganama mpo na kosala ba-carrelage ya Penrose.
lingala.two_rhombi_fat_thin_aperiodic_never_re: Ba-rhombe mibale (mafutamafuta + moke). Apériodique — ezongelaka te. Symétrie ya mbala 5.
lingala.kite_dart_aperiodic_with_5_fold_symmet: Cerf-volant + dard. Apériodique na symétrie ya mbala 5.
lingala.right_triangles_arranged_in_pinwheels_: Ba-triangle sembo ebongisami na ba-pinwheel. Apériodique. Esalelami na ba-carreau na Federation Square (Melbourne).
lingala.single_polygon_that_tiles_aperiodicall: Polygone kaka moko oyo etondisaka na ndenge apériodique. Bomoni monene ya kala mingi te na Smith, Myers, Kaplan, Goodman-Strauss.
lingala.improvement_on_hat_uses_only_direct_no: Bobongisi ya hat — esalelaka kaka ba-carreau ya alima (ya bokanisi te).
lingala.5_sided_tiles_found_in_cairo_street_pa: Ba-carreau ya mipanzi 5. Emonanaka na babalabala ya Caire. Carreau mokomoko ezali na ba-angle 4 ya ~120° + moko ya 90°.
lingala.use_2_vertex_types_14_distinct_ones_so: Esalelaka ba-ndenge 2 ya nsɔ́ngɛ. 14 ya bokeseni (basusu batunaka). Ekomandami koleka ya Archimède.
lingala.divide_plane_into_cells_closest_to_eac: Kabolá plan na ba-cellule pene na point "nkona" mokomoko. Ebimaka na bomoi (batɔnɔ ya girafe, mousse).
lingala.triangle_mesh_with_property_that_no_po: Filet ya triangle na ezaleli oyo point moko te ezali na kati ya cercle-circonscrit ya triangle nyonso. Dual ya Voronoï.
lingala.15_distinct_convex_pentagon_shapes_can: Bililingi 15 ya bokeseni ya pentagone convexe ekoki kotondisa plan. Ya nsuka emonanaki 2015 (Mann, McLoud, Von Derau). Marjorie Rice azwaki 4 lokola amateur na ba-1970.
lingala.heptagons_impossible_in_euclidean_tile: Ba-heptagone (ekoki te na Euclide) etondisaka plan hyperbolique na 3 zingazinga ya nsɔ́ngɛ mokomoko. Esalemaki na Escher.
lingala.square_tiles_with_curves_or_diagonals_: Ba-carreau ya karé na ba-courbe to ba-diagonale. Elakisi ya ndenge nyonso → motindo lokola labyrinthe.
lingala.latitude_longitude_in_decimal_degrees_: Latitude + longitude na ba-degré décimal. Lat: 0° = équateur, ±90° = ba-pôle. Lon: 0° = Greenwich, ±180° = pene na molɔ́ngɔ́ ya date international.
lingala.famous_structures_their_angles: 🏛 Batongami ya lokumu + ba-angle na yango
lingala.at_each_vertex_you_need_3_polygons_who: Na nsɔ́ngɛ mokomoko, osengeli ba-polygone 3+ oyo bosangani ya angle na yango ezali < 360° (soki te ekómi alima to ekoki te). Kaka ba-combinaison 5 esalaka mpo na ba-polygone régulier.
lingala.v_e_f_2_holds_for_every_convex_polyhed: V − E + F = 2 esalaka mpo na polyèdre convexe nyonso (elongo na ba-solide 5 ya Platon).
lingala.connecting_face_centers_of_a_platonic_: Kokangisa ba-centre ya bilongi ya solide ya Platon epesaka "dual" na yango. Kubu ↔ octaèdre; dodécaèdre ↔ icosaèdre; tétraèdre ↔ yango moko.
lingala.13_semi_regular_solids_same_arrangemen: Ba-solide 13 semi-régulier — bosangani moko na nsɔ́ngɛ mokomoko, kasi ba-ndenge ebele ya polygone. Ezali na icosaèdre tronqué (motindo ya ballon ya makolo).
lingala.4_regular_star_polyhedra_with_pentagra: Ba-polyèdre-monzoto 4 régulier na bilongi to basɔ́ngɛ ya pentagramme. Convexe te.
lingala.start_with_triangle_on_each_side_repla: Bandá na triangle. Na mopanzi mokomoko, tiá na esika ya kati-kati mipanzi mibale ya triangle moke. Zóngelá. Périmètre ya suka te, etando ya suka.
lingala.start_with_triangle_remove_middle_smal: Bandá na triangle. Longolá triangle ya kati (ya moke). Zóngelá na triangle nyonso etikali. Dimension ya Hausdorff log(3)/log(2) ≈ 1.585.
lingala.remove_middle_third_of_segment_repeat_: Longolá eteni ya kati ya segment. Zóngelá na segment nyonso etikali. Ya kotángama te kasi bolai ya mobimba ezali zéro.
lingala.points_c_where_iterating_z_z_c_stays_b: Ba-point c epai kozongela z = z² + c etikalaka na ndelo. Bosikisiki ya suka te na zoom nyonso. Emonanaki 1980.
lingala.for_each_c_points_z_where_iterating_z_: Mpo na c mokomoko, ba-point z epai kozongela z = z² + c etikalaka na ndelo. c mokomoko epesaka ensemble ya Julia ya bokeseni; elongo etondisaka ensemble ya Mandelbrot.
lingala.fold_a_strip_of_paper_in_half_repeated: Gumbá eteni ya papye na kati-kati mbala na mbala; fungolá bogumbami mokomoko na 90°. To botii-na-esika ya kozongela ya ba-segment.
lingala.iterated_function_system_random_select: Système ya fonction ya kozongela. Boponi ya ndenge nyonso ya ba-carte affine 4 ebimisaka elilingi ya fougère.
lingala.fractional_dimension_coastline_1_2_1_3: Dimension ya eteni. Libongo ~1.2-1.3 na kotalela ekólo. Ekangaka "botutu" koleka ba-dimension ya mobimba.
lingala.defining_property_strict_self_similari: Ezaleli oyo elimbolaka. Bokokani-na-yango-moko ya makasi (Koch) to ya statistique (mabongo).
lingala.coastlines_trees_lungs_bronchi_blood_v: Mabongo, banzete, mapumu (bronches), misisa ya makila, ba-réseau ya mai, milɔngɔ ya bangomba, mapata, nkake.
lingala.flat_plane_parallel_postulate_holds_an: Plan ya alima. Postulat ya milɔ́ngɔ́ ya kolanda esalaka. Ba-angle ya triangle esangani sikisiki na 180°.
lingala.surface_of_sphere_triangle_angles_sum_: Surface ya sphère. Ba-angle ya triangle esangani KOLEKA 180°. Boleki ekokani na etando. Esalelami na navigation.
lingala.saddle_shaped_surface_triangle_angles_: Surface ya elilingi ya selle. Ba-angle ya triangle esangani NA NSÉ ya 180°. Milɔ́ngɔ́ ya kolanda mingi eleka na point oyo ezali na molɔ́ngɔ́ te.
lingala.shortest_paths_on_a_surface_straight_l: Banzela ya mokuse na surface. Milɔ́ngɔ́ ya alima (Euclide); ba-grand cercle (sphère); milɔ́ngɔ́ hyperbolique.
lingala.largest_circles_on_a_sphere_equator_me: Ba-cercle ya minene koleka na sphère. Équateur + ba-méridien. Ba-vol ya mpɛpɔ elandaka banzela ya grand cercle.
lingala.euclidean_0_spherical_positive_hyperbo: Euclide = 0. Sphérique = positif. Hyperbolique = négatif. Courbure elimbolaka géométrie.
lingala.on_sphere_of_radius_r_triangle_area_r_: Na sphère ya rayon R, etando ya triangle = R² × (bosangani ya angle − π).
lingala.positions_on_earth_s_surface_use_spher: Bisika na surface ya Mabelé esalelaka géométrie sphérique (to na bosikisiki, ellipsoïdale).
lingala.nyc_to_tokyo_is_shortest_via_the_arcti: NYC tii Tokyo ezali mokuse na nzela ya Arctique, na ɛst semba te — wana nde grand cercle.
lingala.spacetime_is_curved_by_mass_energy_geo: Ntango-esika egumbami na kilo-nguya. Ba-géodésique na ntango-esika egumbami EZALI banzela ya biloko oyo ezali kokweya na bonsomi.
lingala.a_vertical_or_angled_gnomon_casts_a_sh: "Gnomon" ya alima to ya angle ebimisaka elili. Wana Mabelé ebaluki, elili etambolaka likolo ya bilembo.
lingala.for_accuracy_gnomon_must_be_parallel_t: Mpo na bosikisiki, gnomon esengeli kozala parallèle na axe ya Mabelé — angle na horizontal = latitude ya esika.
lingala.dial_plate_perpendicular_to_gnomon_par: Etando ya cadran perpendiculaire na gnomon (parallèle na équateur). Milɔ́ngɔ́ ya ngonga ekabwani ndenge moko na 15°.
lingala.dial_plate_parallel_to_ground_hour_lin: Etando ya cadran parallèle na mabelé. Milɔ́ngɔ́ ya ngonga ekabwani ndenge moko te — formule: tan(angle ya molɔ́ngɔ́ ya ngonga) = sin(latitude) × tan(angle ya ngonga).
lingala.dial_on_a_wall_hour_lines_depend_on_wa: Cadran na efelo. Milɔ́ngɔ́ ya ngonga etaleli azimut ya efelo + latitude.
lingala.sundial_time_differs_from_clock_time_b: Ntango ya montre ya moi ekeseni na ntango ya montre tii ~16 miniti na mbula mobimba. Mpo na orbite ellipsoïdale ya Mabelé + bogumbami ya axe.
lingala.figure_8_trace_of_sun_s_position_at_sa: Litambwisi ya lolenge ya 8 ya esika ya moi na ntango moko ya montre mokolo na mokolo mpo na mbula. Emonisami na ba-montre ya moi ya likolo.
lingala.sundial_shows_local_apparent_solar_tim: Montre ya moi elakisaka NTANGO YA MOI ya esika oyo emonanaka. Ekeseni na ntango ya mboka na boleki ya longitude na kati ya fuseau + DST.
lingala.very_precise_sundials_with_corrections: Ba-montre ya moi ya sikisiki mingi na ba-correction ya équation ya ntango + longitude. Ya sikisiki tii ba-segɔnde.
lingala.phi_1_61803398874989_irrational_roots_: φ (phi) ≈ 1.61803398874989... Irrationnel. Ba-racine ya x² = x + 1.
lingala.a_line_divided_so_that_whole_larger_la: Molɔ́ngɔ́ ekabwani na ndenge mobimba : monene = monene : moke. (a+b)/a = a/b = φ.
lingala.ratio_of_consecutive_fibonacci_numbers: Ratio ya mituya ya Fibonacci ya kolandana epusanaka na φ: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21 → 21/13 ≈ 1.615.
lingala.long_side_short_side_remove_a_square_r: Mopanzi molai / mopanzi mokuse = φ. Longolá karé → rectangle etikali ezali mpe ya wolo.
lingala.logarithmic_spiral_with_growth_factor_: Spirale logarithmique na facteur ya bokoli φ na kati-baluka mokomoko. Emekami na ba-karé + ba-arc ya Fibonacci.
lingala.ratios_of_pentagram_diagonals_to_sides: Ba-ratio ya ba-diagonale ya pentagramme na mipanzi = φ. Pythagore ayebaki oyo.
lingala.spiral_arrangements_in_sunflowers_pine: Bosangisi ya spirale na bafulɛlɛ ya moi, ba-pomme ya pin, ba-coquille ya nautilus. Elakisaka bosangisi ya malamu mpo na ba-méristème oyo ezali kokola.
lingala.often_claimed_in_parthenon_mona_lisa_e: Mbala mingi balobaka na Parthénon, Mona Lisa, bt — makambo mingi ezali na bosolo te. Ntɔki ya solo ya ratio ya wolo: bosaleli ya nkó ya siɛklɛ 20 (Le Corbusier, Dali).
lingala.long_believed_humans_find_golden_ratio: Kala mingi bandimaki ete bato bamonaka ratio ya wolo lokola kitoko koleka. Bilembeteli ya makasi ezali moke koleka ndenge masolo ya lokumu elobaka.
lingala.1_1_1_1_1_1_most_irrational_number_slo: φ = 1 + 1/(1 + 1/(1 + 1/(...))). Motango irrationnel koleka — fraction continue oyo epusanaka malɛmbɛ koleka.
lingala.active_research_area_can_solve_cubic_e: Etuka ya bolukiluki ya makasi. Ekoki kosilisa ba-équation cubique (ekoki te na compas + molɔ́ngɔ́-sembo kaka). Ekangani na algèbre.
lingala.at_any_flat_foldable_vertex_mountain_f: Na nsɔ́ngɛ nyonso oyo ekoki kogumbama ya alima, |# bogumbami ya ngomba − # bogumbami ya lobwaku| = 2.
lingala.at_a_flat_foldable_vertex_alternating_: Na nsɔ́ngɛ oyo ekoki kogumbama ya alima, ba-angle ya kobalusama zingazinga ya nsɔ́ngɛ esangani na 180°.
lingala.standard_paper_can_be_folded_in_half_7: Papye ya momesano ekoki kogumbama na kati-kati ~7 mbala. Bogumbami mokomoko ekómisaka bozindo mbala mibale. Nsima ya 7, papye ekómaka makasi mingi. Record (na bisaleli ya nkó + papye monene): bogumbami 12.
lingala.flat_sheet_can_fold_into_virtually_any: Eteni ya alima ekoki kogumbama na pene elilingi nyonso ya 3D soki bogumbami ekoki. Origami ya sikawa ekomandami mingi.
lingala.real_world_space_telescopes: Mokili ya solo: ba-télescope ya espace
lingala.james_webb_space_telescope_sunshield_f: Ebombeli-moi ya James Webb Space Telescope egumbamaki mpo na kobima (mibeko ya origami), efungwamaki na espace.
lingala.folded_efficiently_to_fit_in_compartme: Egumbami malamu mpo na kokota na esika, efungwamaka mbangu.
lingala.origami_inspired_medical_stents_fold_t: Ba-stent ya monganga ya origami egumbamaka moke mpo na kokota, epanzanaka na mosisa.
lingala.parallelogram_based_fold_lets_large_su: Bogumbami oyo eutaka na parallélogramme epesaka surface monene (panneau ya moi) kofungwama uta na liboke moke na bobendi moko.
lingala.cuts_allowed_in_addition_to_folds_used: Bikato endimami elongo na bogumbami. Esalelami mpo na babuku ya kopumbwa + batongami ya siɛnse.
lingala.parallel_lines_converge_to_vanishing_p: Milɔ́ngɔ́ ya kolanda esanganaka na ba-point ya kolimwa. Point 1 (kotala na nsé ya nzela), point 2 (nsɔ́ngɛ ya ndako), point 3 (kotala na likolo ya tour).
lingala.where_parallel_lines_appear_to_meet_on: Epai milɔ́ngɔ́ ya kolanda emonanaka kokutana na horizon. Elimbolami na esika ya motali + elakisi ya molɔ́ngɔ́.
lingala.horizontal_line_at_viewer_s_eye_height: Molɔ́ngɔ́ horizontal na bosanda ya liso ya motali. Ba-point nyonso ya kolimwa ezali likolo na yango (mpo na milɔ́ngɔ́ ya kolanda na mabelé).
lingala.objects_pointing_at_viewer_appear_comp: Biloko oyo elakisi motali emonanaka ekamweli. Kobenda lobɔkɔ oyo elakisi motali = mokakatano.
lingala.divide_canvas_photo_into_9_equal_secti: Kabolá toile/foto na biteni 9 ya bokokani. Tiá basujɛ na bisika ya bokatani mpo na composition ya nguya.
lingala.camera_tilted_off_horizontal_creates_u: Caméra egumbami longwa na horizontal ebimisaka mobulu, bozangi bopeto, bomɛlɛ.
lingala.sun_angle_determines_shadow_length_dir: Angle ya moi elimbolaka bolai ya elili + elakisi. Angle ya nsé (ngonga ya wolo) = bililili ya molai + langi ya molunge.
lingala.brunelleschi_1413_demonstrated_mathema: Brunelleschi (~1413) alakisaki perspective linéaire ya matematiki. Alberti abongisaki yango (1435).
lingala.distant_objects_appear_bluer_less_dist: Biloko ya mosika emonanaka bulé koleka + polele te mpo na kopanzana ya mopepe.
lingala.some_traditions_use_specific_angles_ra: Mimeseno mosusu esalelaka ba-angle + ba-ratio ya sikisiki (ba-motif ya géométrie ya Islam, ba-mandala ya Inde, ba-cathédrale gothique).
lingala.mathematical_artist_impossible_objects: Artiste ya matematiki. Biloko oyo ekoki te (ba-triangle ya Penrose), ba-tessellation, géométrie hyperbolique.
lingala.folding_angles_crease_patterns_produce: Ba-angle ya bogumbami + motindo ya bogumbami ebimisaka ba-sculpture 3D uta na papye ya alima.
lingala.curves_formed_when_a_plane_intersects_: Ba-courbe esalemi wana plan ekatanaka na cône (mbala mibale). Angle ya plan na axe ya cône elimbolaka ndenge ya courbe.
lingala.the_only_5_convex_regular_polyhedra_al: Kaka ba-polyèdre 5 convexe régulier. Bilongi nyonso ezali ba-polygone régulier ya bokokani, motango moko ekutanaka na nsɔ́ngɛ mokomoko.
lingala.shapes_that_exhibit_self_similarity_at: Bililingi oyo elakisaka bokokani-na-yango-moko na mokolo nyonso. Ebengamaki na Benoît Mandelbrot (1975) uta na Latin fractus, "ebukani".
lingala.geometries_on_curved_surfaces_euclid_s: Ba-géométrie na ba-surface ya kogumbama. Postulat ya milɔ́ngɔ́ ya kolanda ya Euclide esalaka te. Emonanaki na ba-1820 (Lobatchevski, Bolyai, Gauss).
lingala.projecting_curved_earth_onto_a_flat_ma: Kotia Mabelé ya kogumbama na karte ya alima ntango nyonso ebebisaka eloko moko — ba-angle, ba-etando, bantaka, to bililingi. Projection mokomoko ebongi mpo na bosaleli ya bokeseni.
lingala.many_popular_claims_about_the_golden_r: Makambo mingi ya lokumu na ntina ya ratio ya wolo na ntɔki, botongi, mpe "kitoko" ezali na bosolo te to esalemi na sima. Ba-ezaleli ya matematiki ezali ya solo + ya kitoko; makambo ya mimeseno mbala mingi ezali te.
lingala.origami_connects_geometry_to_engineeri: Origami ekangisaka géométrie na ingénierie, biologie, mpe bosali. Ba-théorème ya matematiki etambwisaka bogumbami oyo ekoki.
lingala.many_athletic_skills_depend_on_launch_: Bwanya mingi ya masano etaleli ba-angle ya kobwaka. Oyo ya momesano "45° ezali malamu koleka" ezali solo kaka mpo na biloko oyo ebwaki + ekwei na bosanda moko (kozanga mpiko ya mopepe).
